fetchingCurrentUser: Fetching current user account details and preferences.
couldNotLoadAccount: We could not load account details right now. Refresh or try again shortly.
noProfileDataReturned: No profile data was returned for this session.
emailPreferencesDescription: Specify which types of emails you'd like to receive
inAppNotificationsDescription: Select which types of notifications you'd like to be notified
timerPageDescription: Define your preferences for a better workflow
timeAndDateDescription: Choose how your times are shown across Toggl Track
apiTokenDescription: This is a unique identifier used to authenticate you to Toggl Track. Keep your Token private to avoid sharing sensitive information.
profilePreferencesUpdated: Your profile preferences have been updated
couldNotSaveChange: We could not save this change. Try again in a moment.
rotatingTokenDescription: Rotating immediately replaces the current token shown here.
preferencesSectionDescription: Preferences stay on the dedicated profile page because they belong to the user, not the current workspace.
accountDetailsDescription: Keep the current user profile separate from workspace settings so the app matches Toggl's account boundary.
passwordUpdateDescription: Leave both password fields empty to keep the current password unchanged.
changeDetailsDescription: Change details, login methods and your password in Account settings.
showRunningTimeInTitleBar: Show running time in the title bar
keyboardShortcutsHelper: Press question mark "?" to see available keyboard shortcuts
allowProjectShortcut: Allow using @ shortcut to assign a Project in the Timer Description field
allowTagsShortcut: Allow using # shortcut to assign a Tag in the Timer Description field
